entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00008) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 4 TO INCORPORATE FULLY-BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) INTO THE V-22 BOA FOR THE BOEING TEST AND EVALUATION (BT&E) INTERAGENCY WORK TRANSFER (IWT). DUE TO SPS REQUIREMENTS, THE DPAS RATING VERBIAGE UNDER "SUMMARY OF CHANGES" INCLUDED IN N00019-12-G-0006-P00006 IS HEREBY DELETED AND INCLUDED UNDER "DPAS RATING" IN THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00009) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE SECTION H CLAUSES 5252.216-9533 AND 5252.216-9536 TO ADD LAKEHURST AND NAWCTSD AS ORDERING OFFICES UNDER THE V-22 PROGRAM BASIC ORDERING AGREEMENT (BOA). PID NUMBER N00019-15-P7-PMA-275-0308

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 4 TO INCORPORATE FULLY-BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) INTO THE V-22 BOA FOR THE BOEING TEST AND EVALUATION (BT&E) INTERAGENCY WORK TRANSFER (IWT).

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: BOA N0001912G0006 (P00014) awarded to BELL BOEING JOINT PROJECT OFFICE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE ATTACHMENT 4 TO INCORPORATE FULLY-BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) INTO THE V-22 BOA FOR THE BOEING TEST AND EVALUATION (BT&E) INTERAGENCY WORK TRANSFER (IWT), REMOVE THE BELL FULLY-BURDENED RATES (EXCLUSIVE OF FEE) THAT WERE INCORPORATED INTO THE V-22 BOA VIA P00010, AND REMOVE AND REPLACE ATTACHMENTS 2 AND 3 CONTRACT SECURITY CLASSIFICATION SPECIFICATION (DD254) FOR BELL AND BOEING. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF BASIC ORDERING AGREEMENT N00019-12-G-0006 REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING
